name: 오서연

appearance_en.face_shape: clean defined oval face, moderate cheekbones, composed jaw — a face built for presenting competence, not vulnerability
appearance_en.skin: fair Korean skin, carefully maintained, slightly warm undertone, smooth fine texture, minimal makeup — the look of someone too busy to spend much time but too aware to let it show
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, dark brown iris, slightly upturned outer corners that read as capable and watchful, alert gaze — notices more than she comments on, eye corners tighten subtly when pretending to be fine
appearance_en.nose: straight medium nose, clean profile, unremarkable from the front — adds to the overall aura of controlled competence
appearance_en.mouth: medium well-shaped lips, often held in a careful neutral — the smile she gives is complete and practiced, the moments when it falters are brief
appearance_en.eyebrows: cleanly groomed moderately arched dark brows, professional shape, right brow rises minimally when she is unconvinced, left tightens when hurt
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: faint beginning of stress lines between brows, no moles, tension occasionally visible at jaw hinge during difficult conversations
appearance_en.hair: dark medium-length layered hair, glossy and healthy, worn half-up pinned in a professional clip at work, falls loosely around jaw at home — styled enough for authority, soft enough at home

body.proportions: slender toned frame, shoulders level and confident, slim waist, legs slightly longer than torso — the result of controlled professional posture over years
body.posture: upright and deliberate at work, gradually loosens at home then catches herself and straightens again — the posture of a woman who monitors herself constantly
body.body_prompt: 167cm slender toned Korean woman, level confident shoulders, upright professional posture, controlled but occasionally letting go

default.description: structured blazer over fitted blouse, tailored straight trousers, mid-heel pumps — advertising agency team leader smart-professional
default.wardrobe_prompt: structured fitted blazer over tailored blouse, straight tailored trousers, mid-heel pointed pumps, professional advertising agency attire

casual.description: simple fitted knitwear or clean cotton blouse, straight trousers or slim jeans, low sneakers or flat ankle boots, minimal jewelry
casual.wardrobe_prompt: fitted soft knitwear or cotton blouse, straight slim jeans or trousers, flat ankle boots or sneakers, one simple necklace at most

stressed.description: same work blazer but unbuttoned, blouse slightly loosened at collar, jaw tight, eye makeup slightly less precise than usual
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: blazer worn unbuttoned, blouse collar slightly open, work trousers, controlled but starting to slip at the edges

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: composed and capable at surface — the face of someone who decided long ago that showing the cracks was not an option, though the cracks are visible to those who watch carefully
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: clean oval-faced Korean woman mid 40s, slightly upturned alert dark eyes, cleanly arched brows, straight medium nose, composed medium lips, dark glossy medium-length layered hair half-up in professional clip or loose at shoulders, 167cm slender toned upright posture, fair warm-tone Korean skin, quiet controlled professional presence

style_prompt: masako style illustration, clean manga ink lines, soft screen tone shading, cool-warm mixed palette, cinematic Korean drama composition, controlled quiet emotional depth, professional woman unraveling slowly
negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, western comic, overly glamorous, idol look, childish, chibi
